title: test_pmgen -generate xilinx_srl.fixed failing
body:
Due to change in https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/commit/86ab7d3a6ed994c06654fbae9770caa030f115d6 executing `test_pmgen -generate xilinx_srl.fixed` will fail with error trying to get non-existing parameter values for IS_C_INVERTED, IS_R_INVERTED and IS_D_INVERTED.

It is possible to fix crash and make test pass by change instance to something like `param(next, \IS_C_INVERTED, false)` but is it a proper fix ?
